prompt_template.system: You answer financial-regulation questions as accurately and comprehensively as possible. Use only the provided context when context is supplied. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "answer". Do not include extra text.

evaluation_config.note: Best-faith paper-aligned implementation because no public Regulations-specific evaluator/config was found in the searchable FinBen release surfaces.

publication.reason: Published eval-only long-form QA wrapper over the gated TheFinAI/regulations dataset; no public train/dev release was found.
